scripts.build:all: npm -w packages/shared run build && npm -w packages/db run build && npm -w packages/auth run build && npm -w backend run build && npm -w frontend/apps/web run build && npm -w frontend/apps/app run build && npm -w frontend/apps/admin run build
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:backend && npm run deploy:web && npm run deploy:app && npm run deploy:admin
